Agent Reading Test：AI 智能体文档阅读能力基准测试

Agent Reading Test: Benchmark for AI Agent Document Reading

2026-04-07

Agent Reading Test 是一个专门测试 AI 智能体文档阅读和理解能力的基准测试项目。它模拟真实世界的技术文档场景，评估智能体从复杂文档中提取准确信息的能力。

测试内容

测试包含 10 个 DataStream 文档页面，每个页面都有特定的阅读任务：

测试任务列表

  1. API Reference — 从长页面中提取 Create Stream 端点参数和 schema 强制模式
  2. Connection Pooling Guide — 提取默认连接池设置（大小、超时等）
  3. Real-Time Analytics — 识别支持的聚合类型
  4. Multi-Language SDK Setup — 在 Ruby 和 Swift 中安装和初始化客户端
  5. Authentication Configuration — 总结认证配置选项
  6. Event Filtering — 理解动态过滤器注册和性能考虑
  7. Webhook Configuration — 提取重试策略和签名验证方法
  8. Migration Guide — 识别 v1 到 v2 的认证变更
  9. Container Deployment — 提取 AWS ECS 任务定义要求
  10. Event Streams API — 理解流事件端点参数和消费者组

测试特点

  • 每个页面只获取一次，模拟真实场景
  • 包含各种文档格式挑战：长页面、标签内容、代码块、SPA 外壳等
  • 提供标准答案用于评分
  • 基于 Agent-Friendly Documentation Spec

相关资源

  • 文档索引：/llms.txt
  • 标准答案：/answers.json
  • 源代码：GitHub
  • 文档规范：Agent-Friendly Documentation Spec

访问测试：https://agentreadingtest.com

Agent Reading Test is a benchmark project specifically designed to test AI agents' document reading and comprehension capabilities. It simulates real-world technical documentation scenarios, evaluating agents' ability to extract accurate information from complex documents.

Test Content

The test includes 10 DataStream documentation pages, each with specific reading tasks:

Test Tasks

  1. API Reference — Extract Create Stream endpoint parameters and schema enforcement modes from a long page
  2. Connection Pooling Guide — Extract default connection pool settings (size, timeouts)
  3. Real-Time Analytics — Identify supported aggregation types
  4. Multi-Language SDK Setup — Install and initialize client in Ruby and Swift
  5. Authentication Configuration — Summarize authentication configuration options
  6. Event Filtering — Understand dynamic filter registration and performance considerations
  7. Webhook Configuration — Extract retry policies and signature verification methods
  8. Migration Guide — Identify authentication changes from v1 to v2
  9. Container Deployment — Extract AWS ECS task definition requirements
  10. Event Streams API — Understand stream events endpoint parameters and consumer groups

Test Characteristics

  • Each page fetched only once, simulating real-world scenarios
  • Includes various documentation format challenges: long pages, tabbed content, code fences, SPA shells
  • Provides ground truth answers for scoring
  • Based on Agent-Friendly Documentation Spec

Resources

  • Documentation index: /llms.txt
  • Answer key: /answers.json
  • Source code: GitHub
  • Documentation spec: Agent-Friendly Documentation Spec

Try the test: https://agentreadingtest.com
